meta.description: Translations for VariableTemplate patterns using =variable= syntax (StartReplace)

entries.key: =subject.T= =verb:bask= in the sunlight and =verb:absorb= the nourishing rays.
entries.text: =subject.T=は日光の中で日光浴し、滋養に満ちた光を吸収した。

entries.key: This shrine depicts a significant event from the life of the ancient =sultan.term= =subject.name=:
entries.text: この祠は古の=sultan.term= =subject.name=の生涯における重大な出来事を描いている:

entries.key: A trio of tongues vegetate from =subject.t's= =bodypart:Face=!
entries.text: 3本の舌が=subject.t=の=bodypart:Face=から生えてきた！
Dynamic VariableTemplate sites are translated at their text source, not at StartReplace call site
entries.note: Sites: HistoryAPI, JournalAPI, KithAndKin*, WaterRitualRandomMutation, CreatureRegionSpice, BlowAwayGas, DesalinationPellet, EatenAccomplishment, Interactable, InteriorBlockEntrance, Preacher, TakenAccomplishment, RuinedAccomplishment, SitOnChair, ScriptCallToArms, Leveler, AchillesHeel, ActivePartMalfunctioning, CatacombWall, CryoProjectile, EMP, ElectricalDischarge, EmergencyTeleporter, Engulf, FlammableProtocol, GasGrenade, Hologram, PrizeItem, SultanShrine, Teleporter, WaterCollector, SpindleLauncher
